name: cpig-booleans-03-smoothunion-sphere-sphere
description: Phase D4 boolean audit (B0). SmoothUnion of two CPig tape spheres with a blend radius of 5. CPigSmoothUnion prompts for the blend radius FIRST, then the field picks — so the macro is `_SelAll _CPigSmoothUnion 5`. Expected: a peanut shape similar to cpig-booleans-00 but with a SMOOTHER, fillet-like join where the two spheres meet (vs the crisp circular crease of plain Union). Failure modes: looks identical to plain Union (smoothK=0 fallthrough), or one sphere disappears, or geometry blows up (smoothK passed to wrong arg).

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D ray-marched signed-distance surface showing two overlapping spheres smoothly blended together — a peanut/dumbbell shape with a noticeably smooth fillet-like join at the waist (NOT a crisp crease). NOT a single sphere, NOT a blank viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-booleans-smoothunion-sphere-sphere
checkpoints.description: SmoothUnion(sphere(0,0,0;r=10), sphere(15,0,0;r=10), k=5) — a peanut with a smooth fillet join (vs crisp crease of plain Union).
